case_title: BRENDA MOORE ET AL VS. MEGAN ROHRER ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-28-2018 CONTINUED TO JAN-30-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. ***NOTE: PLEASE CHECK STATUS OF COMPLEX DESIGNATION REQUEST WITH DEPT. 304.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
